/usr/bin/ar qc libQXlsxQt6.a CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/QXlsx_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxcellrange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxcontenttypes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxdrawinganchor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxrichstring.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxworkbook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxabstractooxmlfile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxcellreference.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxdatavalidation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxdrawing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxsharedstrings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxworksheet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxabstractsheet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxchart.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxdatetype.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxformat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxsimpleooxmlfile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxzipreader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxcell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxchartsheet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxdocpropsapp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxmediafile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxstyles.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxzipwriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxcellformula.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxcolor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxdocpropscore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxnumformatparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxtheme.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxcelllocation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxconditionalformatting.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxdocument.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxrelationships.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QXlsx.dir/source/xlsxutility.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libQXlsxQt6.a
